query: SELECT us.userId, us.multiplier, us.isEnabled, ss.name as signalName, ss.tradingPair, ea.exchange, ea.isActive FROM user_strategies us JOIN signal_sources ss ON us.signalSourceId = ss.id JOIN exchange_apis ea ON us.exchangeApiId = ea.id WHERE us.userId = 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2yRRhmQmjmz9LMP.root --database 3xjoeN6gTpdmQoJAnkq7pe --execute SELECT us.userId, us.multiplier, us.isEnabled, ss.name as signalName, ss.tradingPair, ea.exchange, ea.isActive FROM user_strategies us JOIN signal_sources ss ON us.signalSourceId = ss.id JOIN exchange_apis ea ON us.exchangeApiId = ea.id WHERE us.userId = 2;
